hero.title: Your vision counts here. Your vision matters.
hero.subtitle: Vouch is the platform that filters the noise and gives relevance to the opinions that deserve it. Follow those whose opinion you respect and don't be swayed by those you don't.
hero.cta: Join and be part of Vouch

meta.games_description: Explore and discover video games with weighted reviews on Vouch.
meta.landing_description: Social platform with weighted video game reviews.

faqs.a1:
Vouch is a weighted review platform. Unlike other platforms, a game's score is not just a number without context — it is broken down into categories with a specific weight depending on the genre of the product. This allows for a score closer to something «objective».

We believe this alone is still not enough, so we added a «personal trust» system where you decide who to trust: Vouch for the critics whose opinion you respect and their scores will be averaged together — this is the Vouch score.
faqs.q2: How does the scoring system work?
faqs.a2:
Imagine any product: internally we assign a specific weight to the most important characteristics that type of product should have, a value between 0 and 1. A user rates each of these categories from 1 to 10, but since the categories do not carry the same weight, they do not impact the final score equally.

For example, in an FPS (First-Person Shooter) we consider that technical quality — performance, frame rate, mouse feel, etc. — matters more than the story. These games typically have rather weak narratives, much weaker than those of an RPG (Role-Playing Game).

When a user gives a 5 in story because it is fairly thin but a 10 in technical quality, the game's score will lean heavily towards positive. In an RPG it would be the opposite: the plot would carry enormous weight in the final score.
faqs.a3:
The Vouch Score is a personalised score visible on every product. It is calculated only from the reviews of the critics you have vouched for — your trusted circle.

The Vouch Score makes the most sense the more selective you are when choosing who to Vouch. You should give this vote of confidence only to people whose taste you believe is similar to yours and who you think will evaluate things the way you would.

The whole point is that when you are unsure whether a game is worth buying, you have a rating that closely reflects what you will actually feel when you play it — cutting out all the noise from users with different tastes, users who engage in review bombing, or users frustrated with a product for reasons that have nothing to do with you.

Here, Vouches are not a popularity contest. Do not Vouch for a critic because you like them or find them entertaining on stream — Vouch for them because of how closely their judgment aligns with yours. Although in the end, the decision is yours alone.
faqs.q4: What is the difference between Vouchers and Vouches?
faqs.a4: When you Vouch for someone, they become one of your 'Vouches': critics whose opinion you have chosen to value. In turn, the people who Vouch for you become your 'Vouchers'. The more Vouchers you have, the more influence your voice carries on the platform.
faqs.q5: Can I use Vouch without an account?
faqs.a5: Yes. You can explore the catalogue, view game pages and read reviews without any account. To write reviews, Vouch for critics or access the Vouch Score, you need to create an account.
faqs.q6: How do I get verified as a critic or press?
faqs.a6: From your profile, in the Verification section, you can request the verified badge if you are a relevant public figure, or press access if you represent a media outlet. The process is manual and may take a few days.
faqs.q7: What are the requirements to become a verified user?
faqs.a7:
There are no fixed requirements at the moment. We value social media presence and not much more. Typically a user with around 50 to 60 active viewers on Twitch already has a well-regarded level of influence, although that is not strictly necessary. Since it is a manual review, if requests do not pile up, we can also look at the number of videos on a YouTube or TikTok channel — in other words, the effort you put into creating content also matters to us.

In the end it is quite a subjective decision. If the platform grows and we need to bring in more people, I will consider setting out more concrete evaluation criteria.
faqs.q8: What benefits does a verified user have?
faqs.a8:
Your profile will display the verified badge, setting you apart from the rest, which will also appear alongside each of your reviews.

You will also be able to include YouTube, TikTok and Twitch links in your review text to redirect users to your accounts, and you will have access to surveys and announcements exclusive to verified users. Surveys that could have a direct impact on how the platform works or its scores.
faqs.a9: Achievements are badges awarded automatically when you reach certain milestones on the platform: writing reviews, gaining Vouchers, being among the first to review a game, and more. You can view them all from your profile.
faqs.q10: Can I remove a Vouch I gave someone by mistake?
faqs.a10: Yes. From the public profile of your Vouched user, click the 'Unvouch' button and confirm the action. Keep in mind that this will remove that reviewer's influence on your Vouch Score, so only do it if you're sure.
faqs.q11: Can I delete a review I wrote?
faqs.a11: No, but you can edit it. If you want to delete it completely, please contact us and we will do it for you. This is to avoid losing valuable information about products, since even if you no longer like a review, it may still be useful to other users or the community in general.
faqs.q12: How can I contact the Vouch team?
faqs.a12: You can reach us through our social media or send us an email at contacto@vouch.com.
faqs.q13: Can I suggest a game that is not in the catalog?
faqs.a13: Yes. If you can't find a game in the catalog when searching by name, you will see an option to look it up in the external IGDB catalog and add it automatically to our database. If the game does not appear there either, you can contact us to have it added manually.
faqs.q14: How can I work with you or collaborate on the project?
faqs.a14: Unfortunately we are not at a point where we can accept external collaborators, as the project does not generate revenue and we do not have the resources to manage contributions. However, we are open to hearing any ideas or proposals you may have. You can reach us through our social media or send us an email at contacto@vouch.com. That said, we have high hopes for the project and will work hard for it to grow, and when the time comes, we will announce it through our social media and the website itself — if we reach that point, it will be news we want to share so everyone knows how the project is evolving.
faqs.q15: Why are only English and Spanish available?
faqs.a15:
The team behind Vouch is small and we could not maintain adequate quality control right now — even the current languages may have errors since none of us are linguists, haha.

We do have, to be honest, AI-generated translation files for several languages, but we prefer that they are at least reviewed and corrected by a human translator. Hiring a translator to keep these files up to date for each of those languages is, at this moment, economically impossible for us.

footer.thanks_body: Game information and screenshots are provided by IGDB. Their impeccable work has made this project possible; we are infinitely grateful.
footer.copyright: © {{ year }} Lautaro Rodriguez. All rights reserved.

verify_request.cta_full: Request verification or register as press
verify_request.verified_explain: The verified badge is for public figures and notable personalities. Send us a direct message from your X or Instagram account to start the process.
verify_request.verified_explain2: Include your Vouch username or email in the message so we can identify you. Also, indicate below the social network from which you will send us the DM and your username on that network.
verify_request.verified_note: Note: This is the best way we have found to avoid having to respond to every DM we receive. We will go directly to your DM, verify that your profile is truly relevant and, if everything checks out, we will manually verify your account. As this is a manual process, it may take a few days. We are sorry we cannot make it faster.
verify_request.press_explain: To obtain press access, provide the URL of your media outlet's homepage and a contact.
verify_request.press_email_alt: You can also email us at
verify_request.press_security_note: For security reasons, any email we receive containing a URL anywhere in the message will be automatically deleted. Please be aware of this and send your emails in plain text. Simply naming your outlet should be enough for us to find you through a search engine, and the contact email can be the same address you use to send the request. Thank you very much.
verify_request.sent_body: We will review your request and notify you once it has been resolved.
verify_request.approved_body: Your verified badge is now on your profile.
verify_request.rejected_hint: If you think this was a mistake, you can submit a new request.
